AC-1.description: Map mode no-route renders zoom-cluster + recenter + layers + chat-toggle

AC-2.description: Map mode with-route adds Save chip between Layers and Toggle

AC-3.description: Saved route state paints save chip in copper signal

AC-4.description: Chat mode collapses workbar to single map-toggle chip

AC-5.description: Handler taps invoke their nullable lambdas exactly once

AC-6.description: Theme toggle re-resolves chip surfaces + signal copper without remount

AC-7.description: Sandbox catalog registers 8 canonical map-controls stories

TC-1.description: Map-no-route tree: 4 chip groups (zoom-cluster + 3 chips), no save

TC-3.description: isSavedRoute=true → copper signal-default chip + filled bookmark + 'Saved route' description

TC-4.description: Chat mode → exactly 1 chip with MapOutlined glyph + 'Back to map' description

TC-6.description: Dark theme switch keeps composable identity + brand copper unchanged

CRITICAL-3.description: Cross-platform parity: renamed all 8 story IDs to iOS-canonical form

HIGH-1.description: Touch target ≥ 48dp: Added minimumInteractiveComponentSize() to MapControlChip

HIGH-2.description: Chip gap token: Changed spacing from sm(8dp) to xs(4dp)
